standard alcoholic beverage spirits (40%) regular beer (5%) white wine (12%) red wine (12%)
standard serving 1 shot (43 ml / 1.5 oz) 1 bottle (341 ml) 1 glass (142 ml / 5 oz) 1 glass (142 ml / 5 oz)
approx. average calories per standard serving 100 150 120 130

Note: Actual calories of alcoholic beverages may vary. The addition of mixes will increase the calories of these beverages. Standard serving sizes are based on one drink as outlined in Canada’s Low-Risk Alcohol Drinking Guidelines. Adults and youth (ages 13 and older) need an average of 2000 calories per day, and children (ages 4–12) need an average of 1500 calories per day. Individual needs may vary.
